name: cetus.composio
description: Connect user-owned Composio MCP servers so the agent can use the user's own SaaS integrations.

interface.shortDescription: Use your own Composio account and MCP servers with Cetus.
interface.longDescription: This plugin supports the bring-your-own Composio model: users create and authenticate integrations in their own Composio account, then add the generated MCP endpoint to Cetus.
defaultPrompt: Help me connect my Composio MCP server to Cetus.
Use my connected Composio tools to summarize today's work.
